title: Scenario Classification Schema v6.0
description: Schema for the scenario classification output from Data Processor. Defines the process type and adaptive visualization strategy.

process_category.description: The industrial process category that determines analysis and visualization strategy

confidence.description: Confidence in the classification. Low if based only on column name heuristics without ontology.

ontology_available.description: Whether ontology.json existed at classification time

adaptive_visualization_plan.description: Which visualization strategies apply to this process category

expected_physics.description: Expected physical behaviors for this process type, used by Diagnostician

degradation_candidates.description: Candidates for degradation analysis based on process type
